title: Blockheart SMP
description: The Official modpack for the Blockheart SMP!
body:
![.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/72a0c761df151e84b216ad59eecfe59862f03f20.png)

This is the Blockheart SMP's Official modpack!

The Blockheart SMP is a server with some really talented players aswell as some content creators. This modpack gets updated ever so often if needed and it wont add anything that changes the world, so dont worry of your worlds not having features. Its only made for optimization and the multiplayer aspect of the game.
